results.title: UPI Goes Global: India’s Digital Payment Revolution Expands Across Borders
results.description: UPI is now operational in 10 countries outside India: Bhutan, Singapore, United Arab Emirates, Nepal, France, Mauritius, Sri Lanka, Qatar, Cambodia and Greece. This expansion marks a major milestone in India’s digital public infrastructure journey and strengthens the country’s presence in the global payments ecosystem. The post UPI Goes Global: India’s Digital Payment Revolution Expands Across Borders appeared first on Dharmakshethra - India Unabridged .

results.title: How would astronauts on a space mission drink coffee? That’s why NASA came up with the Space Cup
results.description: In space, astronauts have historically sipped coffee from pouches using straws, but NASA astronaut Don Pettit sought to enhance this ritual. He created the Space Cup, designed to utilize capillary action for an easier way to drink. This innovation not only allows astronauts to savor the rich aroma of coffee but also contributes to vital fluid dynamics research, potentially benefiting future space explorations.

results.title: How ChatGPT Helps With Retirement Planning—And Where Its Limits Begin
results.description: AI can explain retirement basics fast, but financial pros say it may miss key details that matter most when your money and future are on the line.
